issues.title: stream toolInput cannot be null or empty
issues.body: **Bug description** I have a tool function that retrieves dates. The interface runs in call mode and returns all correct results, but when I execute it in stream mode, it always reports an error java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: toolInput cannot be null or empty at org.springframework.util.Assert.hasText(Assert.java:240) Suppressed: The stacktrace has been enhanced by Reactor, refer to additional information below: Assembly trace from producer comments.body:
i met this error too, and the reason is when the function has no params
**stream call toolCall.arguments field returned "".** but **non-stream call returned "{}"** 

 `org.springframework.ai.tool.method.MethodToolCallback`.call() and `org.springframework.ai.tool.function.FunctionToolCallback`.call() has code:
```
public String call(String toolInput, @Nullable ToolContext toolContext) {
		Assert.hasText(toolInput, "toolInput cannot be null or empty");
```

I don't know if this is a problem of LLM or client should compatible this.
